nodes.title: Unet Loader (GGUF)
widgets_values:
## [GGUF Video link](https://youtu.be/Ulw2f0LAxUM)

-------

**DEV model sampling steps >= 20 and CFG 4**

**Distilled model sampling steps <= 8 and CFG 1**

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf - Used in the video](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/LTX-2.3-GGUF/blob/main/distilled/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf)

-------

nodes.title: ID-Lora Prompt Template
widgets_values:
[VISUAL]: <scene and appearance description>
[SPEECH]: <exact words the person should say>
[SOUNDS]: <speaker vocal style + ambient/environmental sounds>

text, subtitles, logo, still image, still video, no motion, static, frozen, blurry, low quality, distorted, bad anatomy, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, glitches, watermark, signature, copyright, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, blurry teeth, disfigured teeth, 
pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly

[VISUAL]: Opens with a close-up shot, camera gently pushes in toward the character. A small, fluffy white bunny with soft fur, big expressive brown eyes, and pink inner ears sits upright on a wooden surface. Warm golden sunlight streams through a nearby window, casting soft highlights on its fur and creating a cozy indoor atmosphere. The bunny faces the camera with an exaggerated angry expression—its eyes slightly narrowed, brows subtly furrowed, and tiny nose twitching with attitude—while still retaining a cute, humorous look. Its ears make small reactive movements, and its mouth opens and closes naturally as it speaks. The bunny’s tiny paws are held close to its chest, occasionally tensing slightly to emphasize the “threat.” The background shows a softly blurred rustic kitchen with glass jars and warm tones, enhancing the contrast between the cozy setting and the bunny’s mock-serious mood.

[SPEECH]: This is your final warning… give me snacks now… or I start chewing everything. Starting with… your favorite things..

[SOUNDS]: cute high-pitched animated bunny voice, soft and playful tone with a slightly cheeky attitude, cozy indoor ambience with light room tone, faint wooden creaks and subtle environmental warmth, no harsh background noise

[VISUAL]: Opens with a medium close-up, camera slowly pushes in toward the character. An elderly man with deep wrinkles, piercing blue eyes, and a long thick white beard, wearing a worn gray cap and dark rugged clothing, looks directly into the camera. His expression is calm and thoughtful, his mouth opens and closes naturally as he speaks, with subtle head movements and slight eyebrow expressions. Soft natural lighting highlights the texture of his skin and beard. The background is slightly blurred, suggesting an outdoor coastal or rural environment with muted earthy tones.
[SPEECH]: I’ve seen many places in my life… but somehow, every new place still feels like the first time. Maybe next… a quiet beach, warm sun, and the sound of waves… yes, that would be nice.
[SOUNDS]: calm elderly British male voice, slightly rough and deep tone, natural outdoor ambience with soft wind and distant ocean waves, low background noise
